text: Narrated ‘Amir bin Sa'd bin Abi Waqgqas: from his father, saying "Mu'awiyah bin Abu Sufyan ordered Sa'd, saying “What prevented you from reviing Abu Turab?' He said: *Three things that | remember from the Messenger of Alldh (&) prevent me from reviing him. That I shouid have even one those things is more beloved to me than red ‘camels. | heard the Messenger of Allsh (%) speaing to *Al, and he had left him behind in one of his battles. So ‘Al said to him: *O Messenger of Allsh! You leave me befind with women and chidren?” So the Messenger of Allah (#) said to him: *Are you not pleased that you should be in the position with me that Harun was with Musa® Except that there is no Prophethood after me?* And on the Day of (the battie of) Khaibar, | heard him saying: *I shall give the banner to a man who loves Allsh and His Messenger, and Allah and His Messenger love him." So we al waited for that, then he said: *Call ‘Al for me." He ssid: 'So he came to him, and he had been suffering from Ramad (an eye condiion), so he (%) put spittie in his eye and gave the banner to him, then Allh granted him victory. And when this Ayah was revealed: ‘Let us call our sons and your sons, our women and your women.. (861) the Messenger of Allsh () called *Al, Fatimah, Hasan, and Husain ‘and said: O Allah, these are my famify." Grade: Sahih (Darussalam) Reference : Jami" at-Tirmidhi 3724
